name: io.github.jmrplens/libgen-mcp
title: Library Genesis MCP Server
description: Search Library Genesis, fetch metadata and download options, and download books and papers.

environmentVariables.name: LIBGEN_MIRROR
environmentVariables.description: Force a specific libgen mirror base URL (default: auto-discovered, preferred https://libgen.li)

environmentVariables.name: LIBGEN_MCP_DOWNLOAD_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory where the download tool saves files (default: ~/Downloads)
